docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEN, HAO AS TO DEFENDANT IBARRA, CRISOSTOMO
RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEN, HAO
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEN, HAO
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED*** PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $100.00 SERVED JUL-16-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT IBARRA, CRISOSTOMO
REMARK:RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 07/23/2025. REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM-GRANTED MAILED TO PLAINTIFF. (RETURN TO SENDER NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY WEN, HAO AS TO DEFENDANT IBARRA, CRISOSTOMO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REMARK:RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 07/30/2025. REJECT LETTER MAILED TO PLAINTIFF. (RETURN TO SENDER ILLEGIBLE UNABLE TO FORWARD)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-08-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-08-2025 VISITING JUDGE TAMILA IPEMA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF HAO WEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CRISOSTOMO IBARRA IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-08-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEN, HAO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT IBARRA, CRISOSTOMO THIS CASE HAS ALREADY BEEN ADJUDICATED IN CASE NO. CSM-24-869212. THE PARTIES ARE THE SAME & THE ISSUES & CAUSE OF ACTION, ATTY/CLIENT DISPUTE, IS ALSO THE SAME. THIS CASE IS THEREFORE BARRED BY RES JUDICATA, THE CASE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REMARK:RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 09/07/2025. SC-130 NOICE OF NTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF. (RETURN TO SENDER NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD)
